title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Look at the question and the ideas around it. Discuss each idea with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.centralQuestion: Which areas of scientific research deserve the most investment?
content.decisionTask: Now decide which two areas should receive the highest level of funding.

script.text: I'd like you to look at this question and these ideas, and talk together about which areas of scientific research deserve the most investment.
Now you have about a minute to decide which two should receive the most funding.
